backlog.title: Build all 15 harness scripts
backlog.description: Implement actual bash scripts in ~/.claude/scripts/ following the specifications in SCRIPT_REGISTRY.json. This is the critical path — nothing works without these.

backlog.title: Write agent definition files (planner, generator, evaluator, cross-examiner)
backlog.description: Create the markdown agent definitions in ~/.claude/agents/. These are the Layer 3 prompts that define each agent's role, constraints, and output format.

subtasks.name: evaluator.md
subtasks.notes: Tuned for scepticism, uses tools, adversarial

backlog.title: Configure Claude Code hooks in settings.json
backlog.description: Register PostToolUse hooks (scoped to Write/Edit) and Stop hooks in ~/.claude/settings.json. Verify exact syntax against Claude Code docs.

backlog.title: End-to-end test on a real project
backlog.description: Run the full harness cycle (PLAN -> NEGOTIATE -> BUILD -> EVALUATE -> COMPLETE) on a small real project. Identify failures and tune.

backlog.title: Calibrate evaluator agent for scepticism
backlog.description: Run evaluator on known-good and known-bad codebases. Adjust prompt until calibration gate consistently catches planted failures. Anthropic needed several rounds.

backlog.title: Deploy harness across all 17 managed AI systems
backlog.description: Once harness is validated, run init-project.sh in each of the 17 managed projects. Adapt known-fixes.md per project.

backlog.title: Build Telegram/WhatsApp bridge (optional)
backlog.description: Set up Telegram Bot via BotFather. Configure token and chat ID. Test notify.sh and telegram-poll.sh. WhatsApp via Twilio as alternative.
backlog.notes: OPTIONAL — harness works without it. Human-response.md can be written manually.

backlog.title: Multi-model orchestration testing
backlog.description: Test model substitution: Opus for PLAN/EVALUATE, Sonnet for BUILD, Codex for browser tasks. File-driven state machine is model-agnostic by design.
